sections.paragraph:
Original: עיבל

Transliteration: ‛êybâl

Phonetic: ay-bawl'

BDB Definition:

Ebal = "stone" or " bare mountain"
  1. a son of Shobal (noun proper masculine)
  2. mountain of cursing, north of Shechem and opposite Mount Gerizim (noun proper locative)

Origin: perhaps from an unused root probably meaning to be bald

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech:
